channel.title: Portal — AI Blogs & Use Cases
channel.description: Personal tech blog on AI use cases and practical engineering.

item.title: Scaling ML inference in production
item.description: Patterns for serving ML models reliably at scale, with monitoring, SLOs, and cost trade-offs.

item.title: Automation wins: Small steps, big ROI
item.description: How to find small, high-impact automations that reduce toil and deliver ROI.

item.title: Beyond the Bot: The 2026 Agentic Playbook
item.description: Full article: architecture, orchestration, and safety patterns for production agentic systems.
